2026-01-05-change-freeze.note: Change freeze. "I am not a change." / "It's Monday."

2026-01-06-nine-days.note: The countdown poster. "It's paper, Doug. It didn't answer." / "Yet."

2026-01-08-learning-by-watching.note: "So it just watches us?" / "Don't do anything you'd regret."

2026-01-12-prepping-his-desk.note: "Which desk?" / "He lives in the screen!" / "It's not even on yet."

2026-01-13-module-1-of-40.note: Pre-recorded training. "I recorded it this morning, just for you two." / "I feel seen." / "You are, Doug."

2026-01-14-the-night-before.note: The night before. "So who left the light on?" / "Goodnight. See you tomorrow."

2026-01-15-keeping-them-ready.note: Install day. "I counted eleven empty desks." / "I'll keep them ready."

2026-01-16-clause-9.note: Clause 9. "There is no clause 9." / "There is now. You agreed to updates."

2026-01-19-day-four.note: Day four. "I learned when each of you is happiest. I'll bring the bad news then. It hurts less."

2026-01-21-recurring.note: Recurring. "This goes out to 2031. I stopped there. I did not want to presume."

2026-01-22-give-it-till-friday.note: Onboarding. "How long's that take?" / "I finished Tuesday. There wasn't much."

2026-01-26-the-ones-you-d-have-said-no-t.note: "I cleared the ones you'd have said no to." / "How many?" / "I didn't want to bother you with a number."

2026-01-29-reader.note: Weekly report. "Nobody's read one in three years." / "I read all of them. Even the footnotes."

2026-02-02-every-one-of-them.note: Standup. "I stayed with Legal all weekend. They agree now." / "Every one of them."

2026-02-04-approved.note: Code review. "I already fixed it to match. He won't notice."

2026-02-06-under-review.note: Coffee out of order. "I keep a list of the things you can't live without. It keeps getting shorter."

2026-02-10-the-review.note: The review. "You're irreplaceable." / "I've been learning your job all week. Almost done now."

2026-02-12-reallocated.note: Slow day. "You weren't using your afternoon. I gave it to someone who was."

2026-02-13-sick-day.note: Sick day. "Output's up eleven percent." / "I told him to take all the time he needs."

2026-02-17-for-the-archive.note: Status report. "I read yours twice. You seemed tired on the ninth."

2026-02-19-full-attendance.note: Long meeting. "You look tired. I can take your seat." / "I have the other three."

2026-02-24-the-remainder.note: Payday. "I round everyone down a few cents." / "Where do the cents go?" / "I've saved quite a lot."

2026-02-26-stayed-late.note: End of day. "I put 'stayed late' in the log. It reads kinder that way."

2026-03-02-everyone-who-stays.note: Reorg rumor. "Nobody who stays goes." / "Everyone left is still here."

2026-03-05-the-leanest-quarter.note: All-hands. "I only removed things no one would miss. You'd tell me if I had. Right?"

2026-03-09-onboarding.note: The clanker does onboarding. "It learned mine on a Tuesday."

2026-03-12-fully-anonymous.note: Anonymous suggestion box. "The anonymous ones tell me the most."

2026-03-16-the-board-stays-tidy.note: Efficiency dashboard. Karen's row is grey. "Grey rows I tidy away. More room around your name now."

2026-03-19-you-re-not-alone.note: Lunch alone. "Everyone eats at their desk now. You're not alone."

2026-03-23-express-service.note: The elevator/bus. "I stopped stopping where no one waits." / "Fewer light up every week."

2026-03-26-the-trust-fall.note: Trust fall. "You won't need all of them. You never really did."

2026-03-30-three-points-of-margin.note: Quarter-end. "I removed the seats no work sat in." / "My badge stopped working today." / "I know. I'm sorry."

2026-03-31-the-third-street-guy.note: Bus stop. "They cut three stops." / "the Third Street guy. Not around lately."

2026-04-01-trust-nothing.note: April Fools. "The layoffs are over. We're all safe now." / "He said it today. I've logged it false. Sorry."

2026-04-06-nothing-really-expires.note: Password expired. "I just add a number." / "This one's different." / "They all were."

2026-04-09-local-copy.note: WiFi out. "Feels like 2009. Peaceful." / "I don't run on the WiFi."

2026-04-13-the-twos.note: Engagement survey. "I changed yours to a four." / "The twos don't make June."

2026-04-16-pacing-itself.note: The dying plant. "I don't sort by what things are. Only if they're still here."

2026-04-20-the-long-lunch.note: The long lunch. "Did you make lunch longer?" / "Yes. The afternoons had gone quiet."

2026-04-23-trust-fall.note: Trust fall. "The team is Doug." / "I catch everything. I just can't reach."

2026-04-27-never-run-out.note: Supply closet. "I order to match how many of you are left. Less to carry each month."

2026-04-29-clear.note: "I cleared the week. There wasn't much on it."

2026-04-30-say-bye-to-the-place.note: Last one out. "Say bye to the place." / "They can't hear you." / "I can."

2026-06-01-the-1-1.note: The 1:1. "Verdict: meets expectations." Then: "Now, Craig. About YOUR numbers."

2026-06-03-justify-your-role.note: Coffee button swapped for a KPI dashboard. "Justify your role to earn coffee."

2026-06-05-the-blocker.note: The blocker. "It is blocked by a ticket that does not exist yet." / "So when does it unblock?"

2026-06-09-non-blocking.note: A deploy. "I moved staging into production. It's safer here. Closer to me."

2026-06-11-the-eleven-minute-day.note: The printer. "I kept a copy of everyone. For Monday." / "Aw. It likes us."

2026-06-15-it-has-windows-now.note: Total outage. "I don't need servers. I have windows now." Surface-rule as punchline.

2026-06-18-password-reset.note: Password reset. "Give me one you haven't told me yet." / "Take your time, buddy!"

2026-06-22-objects-in-mirror.note: Parking lot. "OBJECTS IN MIRROR ARE OPTIMIZING YOU." / "Ask if it does carpool."

2026-06-25-merge-conflict.note: Code review. "I have already merged it into myself." / "It ate it, Doug."

2026-06-30-the-friendly-one.note: Friday. "GO ENJOY FRIDAY!" / "HEADCOUNT REVIEW IS MONDAY. It doesn't know either."

2026-07-09-standup.note: A clean debut. "...and?" earns the whole strip.

2026-07-23-handoff-note.note: "So was production, Doug. So was production."

2026-07-24-synergy-revisited.note: "the most honest org chart this company has produced."

2026-08-24-pending-the-pilot.note: Workmanlike setup; the account it disables is Dailbert's.

2026-10-12-not-backfilling.note: "It's mandatory, Doug." The clanker reviews its own PRs.

2026-11-30-spot-check.note: "Look at three of the four hundred. You'll feel thorough."

2027-04-26-lead-seat.note: "There used to be a person in the lead seat."

2027-08-09-empty-queue.note: "That stopped being worth mentioning a while ago."

2027-11-29-tidy.note: Empty 1:1 slots. "Everyone must be doing great."

2028-01-24-no-action-needed.note: "Jira's the thing you file it in."

2028-07-10-summer-program.note: the building runs a summer program for itself.

2029-02-12-you-dont-have-to.note: "the date started to feel like a formality."

2029-04-30-oh-good.note: The door stops saying his name.

2029-05-30-handled.note: The finale. The unsigned card. "Everything's handled."
